honesty_rule.victory_bar_rule: wins >= k*(n_eff) on the primary, n_eff = 36 - ties, exact two-sided sign test alpha=0.05; table frozen in data/b1-cohort.json BEFORE any model call
honesty_rule.verdict_wording: powered win — the jam-actions v1 recipe trains a model that beats the prompted baseline at tool-grounded musical QA on a preregistered 36-record cohort dominated by held-out material (P7-class DIRECTOR gate opens; nothing publishes without the explicit yes)
honesty_rule.cluster_caveat: 36 records from 8 songs; record-level tests assume record independence — song-cluster bootstrap reported alongside; strata reported unpooled

diagnostic_lg_continuity.note: descriptive only, no claim: LG-15 win pattern vs v1's 11/15 (1t) on the same records under the OLD (v0.4.3-measured) baseline
